steps.title: Spot the cause-effect relationship
steps.content: The passage shows how rising carbon causes proportional audio distortion. The blank must introduce what follows from this for listeners.

steps.title: Match the transition logic
steps.content: “Thus” expresses the logical consequence: the distortion's correspondence to carbon changes enables listeners to perceive those changes. The other choices either add information, suggest false comparisons, or introduce examples—not results. That matches Choice D — thus,.
